nasb.text: The Lord said, “Surely I will set you free for purposes of good; Surely I will cause the enemy to make supplication to you In a time of disaster and a time of distress.

esv.text: The Lord said, “Have I not set you free for their good? Have I not pleaded for you before the enemy in the time of trouble and in the time of distress?

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“我必為你的好處釋放你； 在遭遇禍患和災難的時候， 我必叫你的仇敵懇求你。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我必拯救你，我必使仇敌在灾祸、困难来临时哀求你。
